falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 (resistance level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the current pattern's implied consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the VIX crosses below 20 (volatility threshold)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would contradict the blowoff score's implication of heightened market stress, directly refuting the current phase's assumptions.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 60% similarity to bottom_2024_aug within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the current verdict by proving the assumed structure is not forming.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
